overall.description: A dusk drive through a dystopian industrial highway in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera travels along a multi-lane road passing futuristic corporate towers and industrial smokestacks, moving under a large concrete overpass with graffiti. The scene features mixed natural and artificial lighting with a cool blue color palette.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway with corporate district visible

events.description: futuristic sedan overtakes on the right side
second vehicle passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the left lane of a multi-lane highway towards a distant overpass

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan overtaking on the right at high speed

entered.detail: tall illuminated skyscraper with grid-like window pattern and glowing interior lights
tall chimneys emitting smoke plumes against the darkening sky
concrete lane divider with red and white striped markings
large concrete highway overpass visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide industrial highway at dusk, with a massive glass corporate tower dominating the right side and industrial smokestacks visible on the left. The camera drives forward along the asphalt road, passing concrete barriers while futuristic vehicles overtake on the right. The scene is bathed in mixed natural twilight and artificial building lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with graffiti-covered concrete structure

events.description: entering the shadow of the concrete overpass, ambient light drops significantly
exiting the underpass back into open dusk lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overpass structure, passing through the shadowed tunnel section

entered.detail: colorful graffiti tags painted on the concrete side of the overpass
linear fluorescent lights mounted underneath the bridge deck

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the massive concrete overpass, entering a shadowed zone where the ambient light drops significantly. Graffiti is visible on the bridge supports as the structure passes overhead. The tall corporate building recedes behind as the camera moves through the underpass and begins to exit back into the open.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial highway with electrical infrastructure

events.description: industrial warehouses and electrical pylons become prominent on the left side

agents.ego_description: driving along the highway approaching industrial structures and electrical pylons in the distance

notable_agents.action: large industrial truck driving ahead in the distance with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: tall electrical transmission towers with multiple high-tension cables
low industrial buildings with illuminated windows and metal roofing
tall street lamps with multiple floodlights illuminating the roadway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the scene opens into a more industrial area with electrical transmission pylons lining the highway and warehouses visible on the left. Street lights illuminate the right side of the road as the camera continues driving toward a large industrial truck visible in the distance. The corporate skyline is now replaced by industrial infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a dystopian highway that transforms from a corporate skyline into a gritty industrial zone. It begins on a wide asphalt road at dusk, moving past a massive glass corporate tower and distant smokestacks while futuristic vehicles overtake on the right. As the camera drives forward, the scene shifts into a shadowed zone beneath a massive concrete overpass, where graffiti-covered supports momentarily block the twilight. The environment then opens back up as the camera exits the underpass, leaving the corporate towers behind in favor of electrical transmission pylons and warehouses. Finally, the road expands into a heavily industrial landscape illuminated by street lights, leading the camera toward a large truck in the distance.
